nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Docker build for the Streamlit frontend, installing Python dependencies from requirements.txt and launching app.py on port 8501 with headless server settings suitable for containerized deployment.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-stage build using python:3.11-slim base image; Streamlit is launched with --server.headless=true so it runs without a browser in the container.

nodes.name: python
nodes.summary: Python 3.11-slim based service stage that installs pip dependencies and runs the Streamlit app on port 8501.
